recentHighlights: Broken Link (S4E26) — Season 4 finale. Odo's destabilized molecular structure, Founders' engineered illness, permanent solidification. Garak's attempt to destroy the Great Link stopped by Worf. 'I am a warrior, not a murderer.' Odo escorts Garak personally.

The Quickening (S4E24) — Auberjonois's directorial debut. Plague-world where hope has been systematically extinguished for 200 years. Bashir's 'cure' fails — but he changes the conditions. Catalytic medicine.
To the Death (S4E23) — LeVar Burton directs. Renegade Jem'Hadar rejecting Founders but replicating conquest. Sisko's reflexive sacrifice. Iconian Gateway as dangerous inherited infrastructure.
For the Cause (S4E22) — Eddington's betrayal. 'Nobody leaves paradise.' The Federation as coercive belonging. Kasidy's return as Sovereignty Invariant I.
The Muse (S4E21) — Onaya the creative vampire. Sisko's reclamation argument. Odo's wedding speech to Lwaxana.
